title: Focal's UHC Datapack
description:
A 1.21 UHC PVP Datapack based on UHC BLOX.
UHC BLOX by gerrybrano.
body:
[![Download RP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94f3364896232817aba911b513a447c3c9f2a9e9.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/focal-resourcepack/version/1.1.1) --- > Focal’s UHC Datapack is a 1.21 UHC PVP datapack based on UHC BLOX. > It includes additional settings to make the game more exciting. > > UHC BLOX was created by gerrybrano. Hello, I’m Focal. I made UHC Battle Datapack for 1.21. All the command systems were written by me alone, but I still appreciate UHC BLOX, which gave me the basic ideas to complete this datapack. I’ll continue to update with more new settings and game features in the future :) # About this pack
## Game Rule The game will be played in Ultra Hardcore mode, meaning there will be no natural regeneration. The game will continue until only one team remains, which will then be declared the winner. ## How to setup Stand at the location you want to set as the center point, then enter the command “/function focal:_uhc_setup”. --- I recommend installing resourcepack, otherwise you'll see "Golden Head" as "Recovery Compass". If you want to translate this pack, just send me translated resourcepack language files. I will update the resourcepack ;D --- **If you want to see me create more content, supporting my work gives me the energy to make more stuff.**
> [![Support me on Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5a368690a65792758810fc081de33e5fa9c5a04.png)](https://ko-fi.com/focalsalt)
> [![Support me on Patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/150ad87ca2fc99b8e1ebb73e00d2ac1c9a6d0c83.png)](https://patreon.com/focalsalt) --- Any BUG or Suggest, welcome to my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sErWHY8PXH) to report.
Hope you like it, enjoy :D
